column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column14: Good Quality sxs mmnt made 300m u/s of gauge. No slush in mmnt section. SxS measurement notes: Had SP using compass option intially, was missing flows at the bottom of panels, redid most panels where bottom velocity was missing. Times 1 hour fast on mmnt due to  computer reverting to Yukon time from PST overnight.  Complete ice cover on river, ~5-10cm snow on ice. Mid-section
HG: 3.813 DWL

column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: CIC, no open leads anywhere on river on reach from above gauge to below bridge
column14: Reasonable Quality Ice mmnt made just U/s of Hwy Bridge. Some slush in mmnt section.  Ice ~0.15m thick 3m from shore by gauge at levels location. ~.1m snow on ground, 0.0m snow on ice. Mid-section

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Cloudy , No Precipitation , Light Wind Blowing Downstream
column14: Good quality RC boat mmnt made just u/s of bridge Calm conditions on river. ADCP by Moving Boat

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Partly Cloudy , No Precipitation , Moderate Wind Blowing Upstream
column13: Water almost submerging debris pile on bridge pier
column14: Good Quality RC boat mmnt made just u/s of bridge. Small amount of bank erosion at levels location, ground at shore saturated similar to quicksand. ADCP by Moving Boat

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: No ice present on river banks
column14: Good Qualitu RC boat mmnt. Extrap looks like it could be const/no sli, which would change mmnt by -1.4%, but went with the program recomended pwr/pwr. Stilling bucket used for water levels. ADCP by Moving Boat

column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Clear , No Precipitation , Light Wind Blowing Upstream
column14: Mmnt made in same section as Dec and Jan mmnts. Water level much lower and edges of mmnt section had small seperated channels. 45cm snow on ice by levels hole. Mid-section
HG: 3.301 DWL

column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Partly Cloudy , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: Complete ice cover on river, no open leads
column14: Mmnt made just u/s of Dec mmnt. 2nd mmnt due to SxS bug with 1st one and the program didn't fix it correctly. Slush to bottom in 3-4 panels. Complete ice cover on river by gauge - ice mostly rough with a smooth tongue where open lead was. ~15-20cm snow in forest by gauge. Mid-section

column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Partly Cloudy , No Precipitation , Light Wind Blowing Upstream
column13: River mostly ice covered at gauge, 4-5m open lead going from ~150m u/s of gauge to ds/ of the highway bridge.
column14: Reasonable quality under ice mmnt. Possibly record high under ice mmnt. Slush and Rough ice in mmnt section. Water bank to bank in mmnt section 300m u/s of gauge.  5cm snow on ice in mmnt section, 20cm snow on ground in forest. Gauge not reset, orifice line probably burried in silt - based on HG value went high after purge then slowly dropped. High water mark surveyed - 3.981m, ice ledge at shore - fair. Mid-section

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Cloudy , Light Rain , Calm Wind
column13: Large amount of debris on bridge pier d/s of gauge.
column14: Good Quality RC ADCP mmnt made at gauge. ADCP by Moving Boat

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: Control is channel and appears clear.
column14: Moving boat measurement SP w/ARC boat #128 20m D/S of gauge. Navigation Reference: BT (BT: 62.307, GGA:63.478 , VTG: 63.417). No significant QREV messages. No QA/QC concerns. High confidence measurement. DWL at end of path 5m D/S of gauge No discernible HWM. Depth of sensor at 15:35: DWL(3.188) - Offset(1.853) = 1.335m. ADCP by Moving Boat
HG: 3.202 DWL

column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Mostly Cloudy , No Precipitation ,
column14: Monthly average for march os 11.6. Reset at 13:08. Snowmobiled from the Takhni subdivision. Measured at the guage. No slush. Tried to do mmt with stream pro but wassnt enough effective depth for accurate results. Switched to conventional.  Approximately 60cm of snow at gauge.  Mid-section

column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Partly Cloudy , No Precipitation , Moderate Wind Blowing Cross Stream
column14: Overflow on ice of 5-10 cm  Overflow at levels location Mid-section
GC: 0.000 HG: 2.956 SRC: -0.020 No Reset (NR)

column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Cloudy , No Precipitation ,
column14: Measurement done between gauge and bridge. Good section, 2 panels slush (1 slush to bed on slower LB). Majority of the flow is on RB. SNR warnings but always above 4 SNR. Angles due to mmnt section @ bend in river. One panel 11%; -36 degrees, holes are closing as we are drilling. Added a few extra panels to remove >11% QC warnings.  Complete ice cover. Approx 0.030m ice across channel. Ice edge surveyed @ 3.742m. Approx 0.030m snow on ground. Orifice line purged due to significant SRC; line sounds mostly unobstructed but slushy. Will let settle overnight - did not reset.  Mid-section

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Partly Cloudy , No Precipitation , Heavy Wind Blowing Downstream
column13: Large amount of debris on centre bridge pier.
column14: Strong D/S winds during mmnt. RC Boat mmnt made right at gauge Moved orifice into deeper water, now in ~1.78m of water at this WL. New offset 1.874m. ADCP by Moving Boat

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Cloudy , Light Rain , Calm Wind
column13: Large amount of debris on centre bridge pier, a lot of debris looks recent, probably as a resultof June/Julyhigh water
column14: Mmnt made right at gauge, good RC boat mmnt section. Gauge assumed accurate, no DWL after mmnt, used gauge values for MGH. Pulled up orifice line, it appeared orifice line had been lifted up and a lot of the line was being dragged by current. Found no block on end of orifice line. Installed metal orifice block on line and repositioned line with waders. Line was previously ~10m out into river, Line now only ~3m from bank in 1.28m of water at this WL. ADCP by Moving Boat

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Clear , No Precipitation , Light Wind Blowing Downstream
column13: Appears clear, but water into bank LB trees and bushes ~12m at gauge, debris pile on centre bridge pier, photo taken, may be causing some minor BW, Large verticle tree debris on RB above bridge may have submerged debris at base, trees are ~4-5m out in channel at this stage.
column14: Water flat and laminar at gauge and mmnt section. See comments on control condition, debris on centre pier could be causing slight backwater. Water into brush ~12m on LB at gauge, no brush on RB at mmnt sectoin, boat was driven into the Brush on LB to get an accurate edge estimate. ARC boat had no problem with velocity in mmnt section. Loop test detected no significant moving bed, but difference btwn BT and GPS showed  Levels done where orifice line enters water, no wave action. ADCP by Moving Boat
HG: 2.969 SRC: 0.020 DWL
